description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service. Define a build stage with two jobs: a build job that runs on all branches except master, logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, then runs docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" . and docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG"; and a build-master job that runs only on the master branch, performs the same login, then runs docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" . and docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE". Both jobs belong to the build stage.
